title: Comparing Decimal Numbers
description: Drag and drop to compare decimals using place value — students build intuition for number magnitude through hands-on manipulation.

title: Parallel & Series Circuits
description: Add and remove bulbs to explore how brightness changes in parallel vs series circuits — misconception-busting physics made tangible.

title: Biology Lab Safety: Spot the Contamination Risks
description: Identify three contamination risks in a lab setup to prevent sample integrity issues — interactive risk assessment through visual inspection and feedback.
